summary: Iteration 41 - Complete testing of /proposta page post-analisi flow. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified including personal data form with new fields (nome_azienda, email_lavoro, pec), contract articles with important article markers, and chat sidebar.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: POST /api/cliente-analisi/save-personal-data - Accepts new fields (nome_azienda, email_lavoro, pec) - VERIFIED
Backend: GET /api/cliente-analisi/personal-data/{user_id} - Returns all personal data fields - VERIFIED
Backend: GET /api/cliente-analisi/contract-text/{user_id} - Returns 55k+ char contract text with corrispettivo - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/cliente-analisi/partnership-firma - Saves digital signature with articoli_confermati - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/cliente-analisi/upload-document - Supports identita, codice_fiscale, distinta_pagamento types - VERIFIED
Backend: GET /api/cliente-analisi/documents/{user_id} - Returns uploaded documents - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/cliente-analisi/partnership-bonifico - Returns IBAN details - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/cliente-analisi/send-signed-contract - Generates PDF and sends via SMTP - VERIFIED
Frontend: /proposta renders PostAnalisiPartnership with all 11 sections - VERIFIED
Frontend: Personal data form shows new fields (nome_azienda, email_lavoro, pec) with saved data displayed - VERIFIED
Frontend: Contract shows 17 articles with important articles (3,5,7,9,11) marked with circle icons - VERIFIED
Frontend: Chat sidebar (Assistente Contrattuale) visible next to contract with input field - VERIFIED
Frontend: Signature section appears after confirming important articles - VERIFIED (flow working)
Frontend: Payment and document upload sections appear after signing - VERIFIED (flow working)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user with pre-saved personal data (nome_azienda: Rossi Digital Srl, email_lavoro: mario@rossidigital.it, pec: rossidigital@pec.it)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The /proposta page is fully functional with all 11 sections. Personal data form includes new fields (nome_azienda, email_lavoro, pec). Contract articles use 'ARTICOLO X' format. Important articles (3,5,7,9,11) have circle icons. Chat sidebar uses Claude via Emergent LLM Key. SMTP send-signed-contract endpoint is configured with smtp.register.it. Document uploads go to /app/backend/static/uploads/documenti_cliente/{user_id}/.
